nasb.text: For thus says the Lord, “You were sold for nothing and you will be redeemed without money.”

esv.text: For thus says the Lord: “You were sold for nothing, and you shall be redeemed without money.”

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說： “你們被賣是毫無代價的， 你們被贖回也必不用銀子。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“你们被卖未得分文，你们被赎回也不需分文。”

csbs.text: 因为耶和华如此说： “你们被卖既是无偿的， 你们被赎也不用银钱。”
